title: 逃げゆく風を追いかけて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Bright, you're gonna win this Derby! I just know it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dear me... Ryan, you sound terribly assured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japanese Derby, the greatest challenge of
the Classic Triple Crown approaches. Mejiro
Ryan's brimming with confidence.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You should be just as confident as I am. The track
at Tokyo is practically made for you, Bright.
2,400 meters is just the right length!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's got the longest straight of all the racecourses!
That means you'll be able to charge ahead no
problem!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The track is wide, too, so you won't get blocked.
If you just hit the track like always, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro Ryan may be full of cheer, but...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer? Perchance, are you... concerned about
something?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm frank about my worries. While it's true this
track suits her well, I'm still concerned that she
can't control the pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The pace chasers back at the Satsuki Sho were no
joke. If Mejiro Bright relies too much on the final
stretch, assuming things are in her favor...
choice_data_list: You might run into a nasty surprise.
You might run into a nasty surprise.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Urk! You're not wrong... In fact, there's an
Umamusume here who stood out to me. Kinda
reminded me of Ines...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You'll be in trouble if you don't pay attention to
the front runners and pace chasers. It's rare, but
front runners sometimes win the Derby too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's right. I believe something similar happened
the year you ran, Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: You remember?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Of course I do. The front runner who won was a
dear classmate of yours, was she not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's right. The Umamusume who beat Mejiro
Ryan at the Derby was her own roommate, Ines
Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Urgh... Don't reopen that old wound... I was so
bummed by that result... It really hurt!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But past scars don't spell the end of your story. I
was able to come back better than ever because
of all the iron I pumped!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! I wanna put Bright through the same
lesson I had!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hold on for a sec! I'll be right back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: P-pardon? Ryan?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan sprints away at an incredible speed,
but she's back in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hello-lo, Bright! ♪ I'm here to have some fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you must be Ines! I'm positively elated to
make your acquaintance.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Same here! Ryan's been going on about you since
forever!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Her love and affection for you are the real deal!
She's practically drowning in love!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: S-stop, Ines. That's so embarrassing...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Mejiro Bright begins her training by
partner running with Ines Fujin.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hehe, catch up, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... The distance between us keeps increasing... I suppose I have to accelerate a tad...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thump, thump, thump, thump!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Heehee! That's what I want to see! Now, here
comes the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooosh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh no... I can't push ahead! Normally, I can close
the gap, but this time...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Trainer, what happened?
choice_data_list: I see. She's the perfect opponent for you.
I see. She's the perfect opponent for you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: The perfect opponent...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are various types of front runners. Ines
Fujin is one who controls every aspect of the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She sets the pace from the beginning, condenses
the pack in the middle of the race, and finally
sprints forward with all her energy right at the
end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In other words, the type of runner that Mejiro
Bright's least compatible with.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're right, Trainer. While Bright and I both save
our energy for that final spurt, Ines is totally
different.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I could see it clear as day, watching them run just
now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I understand too. I'm so grateful to have had the
chance to run with you, Ines.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I also believe, if you were to help coach me, it
would go a long way in preparing me for the race
ahead.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Right, right! You and I training together is a
recipe for awesome! Plus, I'd do anything for
Ryan's sworn sis.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Ines. I knew I could count on you to spot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The ability to borrow aid from others is more
proof of our Mejiro power, no?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I can receive aid not just from other Mejiros, but
also from the Umamusume we befriend.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ines, I'm looking forward to becoming your
protege.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I feel so reassured—as if I've just gained another
big sis!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
For sure! I'll totally play big sis for you! I've
actually got two little sisters back home.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Now then, you two, let's hit the track! Trainer,
whenever you're ready!
choice_data_list: Right. Let's test out a few different strategies.
Right. Let's test out a few different strategies.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the race approaching, we run several mock
derbies. Before we know it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our strategy is perfectly formed. Mejiro Bright
should be able to hold her own against even the
most oppressive front runner.
